'''鈭歽-d-n''' ('''yadana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hire|hire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hire|hire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-d-n
|-
! Lemma
| yadana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yadanithi|yadanithi]] || [[word:yadaniji|yadaniji]] || [[word:yadanishi|yadanishi]] || [[word:yadani|yadani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadanuthuth|yadanuthuth]] || [[word:yadanujuj|yadanujuj]] || [[word:yadanushush|yadanushush]] || [[word:yadan|yadan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadanuthu|yadanuthu]] || [[word:yadanuju|yadanuju]] || [[word:yadanushu|yadanushu]] || [[word:yadanu|yadanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadanufuth|yadanufuth]] || [[word:yadanufuj|yadanufuj]] || [[word:yadanufush|yadanufush]] || [[word:yadanuf|yadanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yadanethe|yadanethe]] || [[word:yadaneje|yadaneje]] || [[word:yadaneshe|yadaneshe]] || [[word:yadane|yadane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadanothoth|yadanothoth]] || [[word:yadanojoj|yadanojoj]] || [[word:yadanoshosh|yadanoshosh]] || [[word:yadan|yadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadanotho|yadanotho]] || [[word:yadanojo|yadanojo]] || [[word:yadanosho|yadanosho]] || [[word:yadano|yadano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadanofoth|yadanofoth]] || [[word:yadanofoj|yadanofoj]] || [[word:yadanofosh|yadanofosh]] || [[word:yadanof|yadanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yadan忙th忙|yadan忙th忙]] || [[word:yadan忙j忙|yadan忙j忙]] || [[word:yadan忙sh忙|yadan忙sh忙]] || [[word:yadan忙|yadan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadanathath|yadanathath]] || [[word:yadanajaj|yadanajaj]] || [[word:yadanashash|yadanashash]] || [[word:yadan|yadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadanatha|yadanatha]] || [[word:yadanaja|yadanaja]] || [[word:yadanasha|yadanasha]] || [[word:yadana|yadana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadanafath|yadanafath]] || [[word:yadanafaj|yadanafaj]] || [[word:yadanafash|yadanafash]] || [[word:yadanaf|yadanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yadanasha|yadanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyadanasha|goyadanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyadanasha|gokiyadanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yadan眉sha|yadan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyadankn眉sha|goyadankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyadan眉sha|gokiyadan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yadansh毛sha|yadansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyadanksh毛sha|goyadanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyadansh毛sha|gokiyadansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yadanrosha|yadanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyadankrosha|goyadankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyadanrosha|gokiyadanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yadanmusha|yadanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadankmusha|goyadankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadanmusha|gokiyadanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yadansherasha|yadansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyadanksherasha|goyadanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyadansherasha|gokiyadansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yadangasha|yadangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyadankngasha|goyadankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyadangasha|gokiyadangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yadanyasha|yadanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyadankyasha|goyadankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyadanyasha|gokiyadanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yadanyamasha|yadanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyadankyamasha|goyadankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyadanyamasha|gokiyadanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yadan眉sh毛sha|yadan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyadankn眉sh毛sha|goyadankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyadan眉sh毛sha|gokiyadan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yadan眉rosha|yadan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyadankn眉rosha|goyadankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyadan眉rosha|gokiyadan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadan眉musha|yadan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadankn眉musha|goyadankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadan眉musha|gokiyadan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yadansh毛n眉sha|yadansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyadanksh毛n眉sha|goyadanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyadansh毛n眉sha|gokiyadansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yadansh毛rosha|yadansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyadanksh毛rosha|goyadanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyadansh毛rosha|gokiyadansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadansh毛musha|yadansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadanksh毛musha|goyadanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadansh毛musha|gokiyadansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yadanron眉sha|yadanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyadankron眉sha|goyadankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyadanron眉sha|gokiyadanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yadanrosh毛sha|yadanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyadankrosh毛sha|goyadankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyadanrosh毛sha|gokiyadanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadanromusha|yadanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadankromusha|goyadankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadanromusha|gokiyadanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yadanmun眉sha|yadanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyadankmun眉sha|goyadankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyadanmun眉sha|gokiyadanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yadanmush毛sha|yadanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyadankmush毛sha|goyadankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyadanmush毛sha|gokiyadanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yadanmurosha|yadanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyadankmurosha|goyadankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyadanmurosha|gokiyadanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yadan|yadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙d忙n|y忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyadan|hoyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙d忙n|hoy忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyadan|hohoyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙d忙n|hohoy忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yadan|n眉yadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙d忙n|n眉y忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yadan|n眉n眉yadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙d忙n|n眉n眉y忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yadan|n茂yadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙d忙n|n茂y忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yadan|n茂n茂yadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙d忙n|n茂n茂y忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyadan|luyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙d忙n|luy忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyadan|luluyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙d忙n|luluy忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyadan|liyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙d忙n|liy忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyadan|liliyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙d忙n|liliy忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyadan|koyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙d忙n|koy忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyadan|kokoyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙d忙n|kokoy忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyadan|keyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙d忙n|key忙d忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyadan|kekeyadan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙d忙n|kekey忙d忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
